title: sideritis hyssopifolia var. hirta
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia var. hirta, also known as mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis hyssopifolia plant, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Greece. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its rich content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sideritis hyssopifolia var. hirta are numerous and include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Sideritis hyssopifolia var. hirta can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or used in capsule or tincture form, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional prior to consumption.
